title: Deopbap Oat Bowl
description: A classic Korean-inspired oat bowl with a twist, featuring a creamy smooth sauce and crunchy Seoul-style toppings.

ingredients.name: Smooth
ingredients.notes: smooth sauce - can be store-bought or homemade

instructions: In a pot, bring 2 cups of water to a boil.
Add 1 cup of oat and cook according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat 1/2 cup of deopbap over medium heat.
In a small bowl, mix together 1/4 cup of smooth sauce and 1 cup of milk.
To assemble the bowl, place cooked oat at the bottom, followed by a scoop of deopbap and drizzle with the smooth sauce mixture.
Garnish with your choice of toppings, such as kimchi or chopped green onions.
